title: allium schoenoprasum var. alpinum
intro: Allium schoenoprasum var. alpinum, also known as Alpine Chives, is a variety of the Chives plant, a perennial herb belonging to the Allium family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alpine Chives include its ability to aid digestion, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Alpine Chives are commonly prepared as a herbal tea or used as a fresh addition to various dishes, and they can also be dried or frozen for later use in herbal preparations.
